title: cerastium holosteoides var. hallaisanense
intro: Cerastium holosteoides var. hallaisanense is a lesser-known variety of the Cerastium holosteoides plant, which belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) and is native to Korea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Cerastium holosteoides var. hallaisanense include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Traditionally, it is prepared into herbal teas or infusions, and its extracts are used in topical applications and other herbal preparations.
